title: PEDAL COMMANDER for Porsche Macan 2015+ - Throttle Response Controller to Help Reduce Accelerator Lag - 4 Driving Modes + App Control - Performance Mods Upgrades - Macan Accessories
features: Improved Throttle Response for Porsche Macan: Say goodbye to throttle lag with Pedal Commander – compatible with 1st Gen Macan models, including Facelift, Base, S, GTS, Turbo, and all 2.0L, 2.9L, 3.0L, and 3.6L engine variants. A perfect upgrade for quicker acceleration and enhanced driving feel.

36 Adjustable Settings: Equipped with 4 different modes: Eco, City, Sport, and Sport +. Each mode has an additional 36 adjustable settings to fine-tune to your liking, making this one the must-have Porsche Macan accessories
Eco Mode: The Pedal Commander throttle response controller significantly slows throttle response to improve efficiency
Quick & Easy Installation: Pedal Commander is a simple plug-and-play device that takes only about 10 minutes to install. Now, you can control the unit using our free Pedal Commander app

Enhanced Security & Warranty Safe: Protect your vehicle with Pedal Commander's anti-theft feature, accessible via the app with an add-on subscription, allowing you to disable the gas pedal so no one can drive it without permission. Pedal Commander won't void your Porsche Macan's warranty, leaving no trace on the ECU and working seamlessly with other performance mods like tuners, programmers, chips, and cold air intakes.
description: Product Description Pedal Commander Throttle Response Controller For 2015+ Porsche Macan Previous page Next page 1 Yes, Just in 10 Minutes! 2 What`s in the box? 3 Backed by the pros 4 Installation Pedal Commander enhances throttle response for your Macan, allowing quicker access to existing horsepower without adding power. It complements various vehicle mods like tuners, programmers, cold air intakes, and performance chips. Pedal Commander will not leave "flags" on the ECU.
